message: Optimize list command with batch counts and clean up tests

files.patch:
@@ -7,39 +7,41 @@ pub const CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION: i32 = 1;
 /// The complete SQL schema for the beads database.
 pub const SCHEMA_SQL: &str = r"
     -- Issues table
+    -- Note: TEXT fields use NOT NULL DEFAULT '' for bd (Go) compatibility.
+    -- bd's sql.Scan doesn't handle NULL well when scanning into string fields.
     CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS issues (
         id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
         content_hash TEXT,
         title TEXT NOT NULL,
-        description TEXT,
-        design TEXT,
-        acceptance_criteria TEXT,
-        notes TEXT,
+        description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        design TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        acceptance_criteria TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         status TEXT NOT NULL,
         priority INTEGER NOT NULL,
         issue_type TEXT NOT NULL,
         assignee TEXT,
-        owner TEXT,
+        owner TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         estimated_minutes INTEGER,
         created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
-        created_by TEXT,
+        created_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
         closed_at TEXT,
-        close_reason TEXT,
-        closed_by_session TEXT,
+        close_reason TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        closed_by_session TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         due_at TEXT,
         defer_until TEXT,
         external_ref TEXT,
-        source_system TEXT,
+        source_system TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         deleted_at TEXT,
-        deleted_by TEXT,
-        delete_reason TEXT,
-        original_type TEXT,
+        deleted_by TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        delete_reason TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
+        original_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         compaction_level INTEGER,
         compacted_at TEXT,
         compacted_at_commit TEXT,
         original_size INTEGER,
-        sender TEXT,
+        sender TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
         ephemeral INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
         pinned INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
         is_template INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
